violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

The hand-washing sink in the basement kitchen was blocked by a large bucket of clean towels. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the back room. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Spoons in dry ingredients on the service line observed stored with the handles in the food. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The hand sink in the front service area is in poor repair, dripping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2023
Ceiling tile missing in the upstairs storage area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2023
The hand-washing sink in the basement was blocked with bus pans. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023
Frost and debris observed on uncovered bananas in the front service area freezer. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023
Unwrapped foods observed in the service area and basement freezers. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-200 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023

Kombucha was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Kombuchas were relocated to other refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023

Bananas were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils must be stored in a clean dry location, or if stored in water, the water must be at 135 degrees F, or constantly running to disperse food particles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023
Water observed in stacked food containers on the clean storage rack. Cleaned and sanitized equipment must be air dried before use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023
Scoops in dry ingredients observed with the handles in the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023

Single service items observed stored on the floor in the back of the basement food prep area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the food container have an accumulation of paper, adhesive, and stickers. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023
Ceiling tile missing in the upstairs storage area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2023
The hand sink in the front service area is in poor repair, dripping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2023

The insulation on a duct in the mop room is in poor repair, with exposed spun insulation. A support beam in the basement near the 3 bay sink, and the wall along the basement stairs is in poor repair, with paint chipping. The coving beneath the food prep sink in the basement is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
